verses.text: My spirit fails, O LORD; come quickly to my side. Hide not from me your face, lest to the pit I slide. Let morning bring your love anew, for I have put my trust in you.
To you I lift my soul; show me the way to go. I hide myself in you; LORD, save me from my foe. Teach me, my God, to do your will; may your good Spirit lead me still.
